input.stage_objectives: Add bake CLI verbose mode for diagnostic output.
input.stage_exit: Bake CLI supports `--verbose` flag emitting per-step timing + memory.

glossary_slice.definition: Command-line entry for asset bake pipeline.

invariants.summary: Logs default to INFO+; verbose adds DEBUG+TIMING.

tasks.title: Parse `--verbose` flag in bake CLI
tasks.summary: Add `--verbose` boolean flag to **bake CLI** arg parser. No log change yet.

tasks.title: Wire verbose log sink + timing emit
tasks.summary: When verbose set, attach DEBUG+TIMING sinks. Per-step timing emitted to stderr.

output.stage_file_plan: BACKLOG section: asset-pipeline. Prefix counter: TECH. File order: parse task first, sink task second (depends-on chain). No new glossary terms.
